falsification_conditions.condition: The price closes above the 2024 August pattern's resistance level ($150.00) by 10% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear breakout would invalidate the 'HOLD' signal by confirming a bullish trend contrary to the pattern's implied consolidation

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume exceeds 14-day average by 50% with a concurrent 8% price surge
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volume with rapid price movement would refute the 'UNKNOWN' verdict by indicating a decisive market shift

falsification_conditions.condition: Pattern similarity drops below 50% as measured by the system's algorithm within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant divergence from the 2024 pattern would invalidate the current analysis' foundational assumption

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
